entry.title: Java
entry.content: package test1;import java.util.Scanner;class test10 {    public static void main(String[] args) {        // 用户输入数字字符串        Scanner scanner = new Scanner(System.in);        String s1;        // 限制输入为5位以内的数字        while (true) {            System.out.print("请输入一个不超过5位的正整数：");            s1 = scanner.nextLine();            if (isValidInput(s1)) {                break;            } else {                System.out.println("输入无效，请输入一个不超过5位的正整数！");            }        }        // 单位字符串        String number = "万千百十元";        // 补全为5位数字        s1 = padLeftZeros(s1, 5);        // 转换为汉字形式        String s2 = convertToChinese(s1);        // 打印结果        printWithUnits(s2, number);    }    /**     * 方法1: 将字符串左侧补零至指定长度     */    public static String padLeftZeros(String input, int targetLength) {        StringBuilder sb = new StringBuilder(input);        while (sb.length() < targetLength) {            sb.insert(0, "0"); // 在最左侧插入 "0"        }        return sb.toString();    }    /**     * 方法2: 将数字字符串转换为汉字形式     */    public static String convertToChinese(String numberString) {        String[] chineseDigits = {"零", "壹", "贰", "叁", "肆", "伍", "陆", "柒", "捌", "玖"};        StringBuilder result = new StringBuilder();        for (char c : numberString.toCharArray()) {            result.append(chineseDigits[c - '0']);        }        return result.toString();    }    /**     * 方法3: 按照单位打印数字和单位结合结果     */    public static void printWithUnits(String chineseNumbers, String units) {        int length = Math.min(chineseNumbers.length(), units.length());        for (int i = 0; i < length; i++) {            System.out.print(chineseNumbers.charAt(i));            System.out.print(units.charAt(i));        }        // 如果有多余的字符，继续打印        if (chineseNumbers.length() > units.length()) {            for (int i = units.length(); i < chineseNumbers.length(); i++) {                System.out.print(chineseNumbers.charAt(i));            }        }        System.out.println(); // 换行    }    /**     * 方法4: 验证用户输入是否为不超过5位的正整数     */    public static boolean isValidInput(String input) {        if (input.matches("\\d{1,5}")) { // 正则匹配1到5位数字            return true;        }        return false;    }}

entry.title: 我的第一篇文章
entry.content:
欢迎来到我的博客！

这是我的第一篇 Hexo 博客文章。以下是一些 Markdown 格式的例子：

列表

- 项目1

- 项目2

- 项目3

代码块

print("Hello, Hexo!")

entry.title: Hello World
entry.content:
Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub.

Quick Start

Create a new post

More info: Writing

Run server

More info: Server

Generate static files

More info: Generating

Deploy to remote sites

More info: Deployment
